creator: dickey@invisible-island.net
text:
By the way, there are two references to "dialog(1)".

The other (in both mine/FreeBSD's copy) is in "DEFINITIONS",
where the reference does link as expected.

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=dialog&sektion=3#DEFINITIONS
https://invisible-island.net/dialog/manpage/dialog_lib.html#h2-DEFINITIONS
